headline: Salesforce announces Chief Operating and Financial Officer Robin Washington will assume the additional role of principal accounting officer.
investor_impact: This internal finance reorganization appears purely administrative, with no executive departures or compensation changes. It does not alter the fundamental investment thesis and should have no material impact on the stock.
key_figures: Robin Washington (Chief Operating and Financial Officer, new PAO)
Sundeep Reddy (Previous PAO, remaining Chief Accounting Officer)
